title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository providing a lightweight, extensible framework for running large language models locally with a simple API and CLI.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client library for Ollama, enabling easy integration of local LLMs into Node.js and browser apps.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, offering synchronous and asynchronous APIs to interact with local LLMs.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, allowing use of local Ollama models within LangChain workflows.

title: Ollama WebUI
summary: Feature-rich web interface for Ollama, modeled after ChatGPT UI, supporting multi-model chats, file uploads, and RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama, providing idiomatic JVM access to local LLMs with reactive and blocking APIs.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate for interacting with Ollama’s REST API, featuring async/await and strong typing.

title: Ollama-GUI
summary: Lightweight cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama built with Tauri and React, supporting model management and chat.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Interactive CLI chat tool for Ollama with conversation history, markdown rendering, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension powered by Ollama local models, offering inline code suggestions.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that brings Ollama LLMs into servers, supporting slash commands and thread-based conversations.

title: ollama-streamlit-chat
summary: Streamlit chat app template that connects to Ollama, showcasing streaming responses and session state.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline using Ollama, ChromaDB, and LangChain for private document Q&A.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake packaging Ollama and common models for reproducible deployments on NixOS.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-dify
summary: Dify integration enabling low-code orchestration of Ollama models into AI apps and workflows.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama, providing idiomatic Go APIs and streaming support.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# .NET client for Ollama with async enumerable streaming and dependency injection.
